# LegalForecastBench Community Harness Comparisons

Community results are non-official. LegalForecastBench/LFB rows use forecast scoring such as Brier-style metrics; Harvey LAB rows use rubric/native task criteria. Compatible composites are grouped by family, scoring mode, and suite version and are not ranked across incompatible metrics.

## Harvey LAB (lab_native)

| Row | Type | Model | Adapter | Tasks | Coverage | Conformance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | ---: | --- |
| fixture-submission:fixture-shard | single-shard | fixture-model | fixture-cli@0.1.0 | 1 | 100.0% | passed |
